description: Build the marketplace pages (product listing, search, filtering, product detail page), seller profiles, checkout flow, and the buyer/seller dashboard with wallet UI.
steps: Create src/features/marketplace/components/search-overlay.tsx - full-screen search overlay with Command component (Shadcn), recent searches, trending searches, category suggestions. Framer Motion slide-down animation. Keyboard shortcut (Cmd+K).

Create src/features/marketplace/components/filter-sidebar.tsx - marketplace filters: category tree, price range slider, condition (New/Used/Like New), seller verification toggle, rating filter, sort options (Newest, Price Low-High, Price High-Low, Most Popular)

Create src/features/marketplace/components/product-grid.tsx - responsive grid layout (4 cols desktop, 2 cols tablet, 1 col mobile) with product cards, infinite scroll or load more button, skeleton loading state

Create src/features/marketplace/components/product-detail.tsx - full product detail view: image gallery with thumbnails, product info (title, price, description, condition, shipping), seller card with rating and verified badge, 'Add to Cart' and 'Buy Now' buttons, related products section, reviews section
Create src/features/marketplace/components/image-gallery.tsx - product image gallery with main image, thumbnail strip, zoom on hover, lightbox mode

Create src/features/marketplace/components/review-section.tsx - product reviews display with rating distribution bar chart, individual review cards with avatar and date, write review form for verified purchasers
Create src/app/marketplace/page.tsx - marketplace listing page with filter sidebar, product grid, search bar at top, category breadcrumbs
Create src/app/marketplace/[productId]/page.tsx - product detail page composing ProductDetail, ImageGallery, ReviewSection
Create src/app/marketplace/layout.tsx - marketplace layout with search header variant
Create src/features/seller/components/seller-profile-card.tsx - seller profile display: avatar, business name, verified badge, rating, member since, total sales, response time
Create src/features/seller/components/seller-products-grid.tsx - grid of products by a specific seller with sorting
Create src/app/sellers/[sellerId]/page.tsx - public seller profile page with their products

Create src/features/checkout/components/checkout-flow.tsx - multi-step checkout: Step 1 (Review Cart), Step 2 (Shipping Address), Step 3 (Payment Method selection), Step 4 (Order Confirmation). Progress indicator at top.
Create src/features/checkout/components/cart-summary.tsx - cart sidebar/panel showing items, quantities, subtotal, fees, total
Create src/features/checkout/components/payment-method-selector.tsx - payment method selection: Stripe card, PayPal, Wallet Balance. Each with appropriate icons and info.
Create src/app/checkout/page.tsx - checkout page with the multi-step flow

Create src/features/dashboard/components/dashboard-sidebar.tsx - dashboard navigation sidebar: Overview, Orders, Products (sellers), Wallet, Messages, Settings, Verification Status. Active state with gold accent.
Create src/features/dashboard/components/dashboard-stats.tsx - overview stats cards: Total Orders, Total Spent/Earned, Pending Items, Wallet Balance. With trend indicators.
Create src/features/dashboard/components/orders-table.tsx - orders list with status badges (Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Disputed), date, amount, actions

Create src/features/dashboard/components/wallet-ui.tsx - wallet interface: current balance display (large number with currency), transaction history list, deposit/withdraw buttons, pending escrow amount

Create src/features/dashboard/components/seller-product-form.tsx - product creation/edit form for sellers: title, description, price, category select, condition, images upload (drag-drop multi), stock quantity, shipping options
Create src/features/dashboard/components/notifications-panel.tsx - notifications dropdown/panel with grouped notifications, read/unread states, action links
Create src/app/dashboard/page.tsx - main dashboard page with stats overview
Create src/app/dashboard/orders/page.tsx - orders list page
Create src/app/dashboard/wallet/page.tsx - wallet page
Create src/app/dashboard/products/page.tsx - seller products management page
Create src/app/dashboard/products/new/page.tsx - new product creation page
Create src/app/dashboard/settings/page.tsx - user settings page (profile edit, notification preferences, security settings)
Create src/app/dashboard/layout.tsx - dashboard layout with sidebar navigation
acceptance_criteria: pnpm build succeeds with all marketplace and dashboard components
Marketplace page has functional filter sidebar and product grid layout
Product detail page shows all product information with image gallery
Checkout flow has all 4 steps with proper state management
Dashboard has working sidebar navigation between pages
Wallet UI displays balance and transaction history
Seller product form has all required fields
All pages follow the luxury dark theme with gold accents
findings: Build and lint pass cleanly (Next.js 16.2.6 Turbopack). Used unset NODE_OPTIONS before npx commands to avoid proxy-bootstrap module error. React.ElementType caused type errors when using dynamic component icons in JSX - fixed by using React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }> instead. All marketplace, checkout, seller, and dashboard pages render successfully as static pages.
